privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Natural Earth 110m Countries dataset (ne_110m_admin_0_countries), a publicly available geospatial dataset. The dataset contains 177 total country features globally. Exactly 13 features are marked with CONTINENT='South America': Argentina, Bolivia, Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Falkland Islands, Guyana, Paraguay, Peru, Suriname, Uruguay, and Venezuela. The metadata expectations (minimum 10, maximum 15 features) accurately reflect the actual data, which contains exactly 13 South American countries. The CQL filter expression 'continent = "South America"' correctly targets these features. All metadata claims about data values and counts are accurate.
